title: Ortachne pilosa
taxonomy: Ortachne pilosa is a species of grass in the family Poaceae, commonly known as Gramineae. This classification places Ortachne pilosa within the larger group of monocotyledonous plants. The genus Ortachne is often placed within the tribe Paniceae.
